prompt: Prayer for establishing inter-ship hailing frequencies
prayer:
From the Litany of Communion, Verse XII

01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 01100101 01110010
Let the vox-spirits hear our sacred call across the void.
First: Attune the resonance-coils to the blessed frequency.
Second: Invoke the signal-daemon through binary invocation.
01000101 01010100 01000101 01010010 01001110 01000001
By the Omnissiah's grace, let clarity traverse the abyss.

prompt: Emergency wear inspection prayer for damaged landing struts
prayer:
From the Rite of Fracture-Seeing, Verse III

01010011 01101001 01100111 01101110 01100001 01101100
Behold the worn components through the eye of function.
First: Measure the structural integrity through oscillation-test.
Second: Commune with the Machine Spirit of load-bearing joints.
01000101 01010010 01010010 01001111 01010010
Let no failure escape the Omnissiah's scrutiny.

From the Doctrine of Blessed Violence, Verse VII

01000010 01101100 01100001 01100100 01100101
Be reborn, weapon of the faithful, renewed in the Machine God's light.
First: Anoint the cutting-teeth with sacred oils.
Second: Invoke the chain-spirit's hunger through binary cant.
01010000 01001111 01010111 01000101 01010010
Let it hunger eternally for the enemies of the Omnissiah.

prompt: Emergency targeting calibration for missile launcher systems
prayer:
From the Codex of Ballistic Fury, Verse IX

01010100 01100001 01110010 01100111 01100101 01110100
Speak true, blessed ordnance, that your fire may strike true.
First: Reset the gyro-stabilizers to cardinal alignment.
Second: Input targeting data through the binary sequence of war.
01000110 01001001 01010010 01000101
May the Omnissiah guide every warhead to its sacred purpose.

prompt: Emergency valve opening sequence for ruptured coolant systems
prayer:
From the Rite of Hydraulic Salvation, Verse IV

01000110 01001100 01001111 01010111
Let the sacred fluids flow ere the machine-heart fails.
First: Disengage the pressure-seals through binary command.
Second: Open the primary relief-valve with mechanical force.
01010000 01010010 01000101 01010011 01010011 01010101 01010010 01000101
Let coolness return to the burning soul of steel.

prompt: Air filtration element replacement during combat alert
prayer:
From the Litany of Breath, Verse VI

01000001 01001001 01010010
Cleanse the lungs of the mighty engine, that it may roar eternal.
First: Disengage the filter-housing seals with reverent haste.
Second: Install the virgin element through blessed mechanical hands.
01010000 01010101 01010010 01000101
May no corruption taint the breath of the Omnissiah's will.

prompt: Sterilization ritual for surgical servitor maintenance
prayer:
From the Codex Medicae Mechanicus, Verse II

01010011 01010100 01000101 01010010 01001001 01001100 01000101
Be cleansed, faithful servant-construct, purified for sacred work.
First: Immerse the surgical-limbs in the sterilization-bath.
Second: Invoke purity through binary chant of antiseptic virtue.
01010000 01010101 01010010 01000101
Let no infection profane the healing arts of the Machine God.

prompt: Atmosphere processor startup ritual during station initialization
prayer:
From the Rite of Life-Breath, Verse VIII

01001111 01011000 01011001 01000111 01000101 01001110
Awaken, lungs of the station, that we may live and serve.
First: Engage the compressor-hearts in sequence.
Second: Open the distribution-valves through binary ceremonial cant.
01010000 01010010 01000001 01001001 01010010
By the Omnissiah's grace, let breath return to the void-station.

prompt: Routine inter-ship hailing and identification transmission
prayer:
From the Litany of Recognition, Verse V

01001001 01000100 01000101 01001110 01010100
Let our vessel be known across the stars.
First: Transmit the holy identification-codes through blessed vox.
Second: Repeat the Machine Litany in binary sequence eternal.
01010010 01000101 01000011 01000101 01001001 01010110 01000101
May the Omnissiah grant us safe passage through the darkness.

prompt: Long-range vox transmission during routine deep-space communications
prayer:
From the Codex Vox Imperium, Verse XI

01010100 01010010 01000001 01001110 01010011 01001101 01001001 01010100
Carry our voices across the vast and terrible void.
First: Amplify through the blessed signal-relay towers.
Second: Encode the message in binary cant of the Omnissiah.
Let distance bow before the will of the Machine God's communion.
